## Summary

-

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run policy`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run audit`
- [ ] No secrets, databases, player data, binaries, or live malicious payloads
      are included.
- [ ] Game-rule changes include positive and negative regression tests.
- [ ] User-facing behavior changes are documented.

## Security Impact

Describe authentication, data, dependency, networking, or workflow changes.
Write `No security impact` when this does not apply.
